query: Show me everything related to Belgium across all our systems.
reasoning: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of information related to Belgium, which requires data from all available agents to provide a full picture.

steps.task: Search for emails, calendar events, and documents related to Belgium.
Look up all accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, and cases related to Belgium.
Gather information on locations and catalog items related to Belgium.

synthesis: Combine the outputs from each step to provide a comprehensive overview of all information related to Belgium.
